interface.longDescription:
Kick-start your tarot reading right inside ChatGPT. Ask AI Tarot to shuffle digital tarot cards, lay a three-card spread, and return clear, private divination insights—no ads or waiting rooms.

How to Use Tarot in ChatGPT

1. Connect: Connect the Tarot app to ChatGPT.
2. Trigger: Type Commands: Simply type "@" then choose the Tarot app, or type “Tarot” (followed by a space) in the chat box.
3. Create: You are ready to go! Try asking specifically:
"Pull tarot cards for my love life."
"Draw three tarot cards and interpret the spread for my upcoming week."
“Provide a three-card tarot reading on balancing work and health.”

Want to dive deeper? Keep asking follow-ups in chat or open the full app for richer symbolism and saved readings.
defaultPrompt: Want clarity on my life now and what's ahead
